author: drbbton
releaseNotes: 2.0.10: Try dev_cfg as SET command name for LED brightness. 2.0.9: Try bare int value without product field for LED brightness set. 2.0.8: Fixed LED brightness set request format. 2.0.7: Fixed LED brightness clamp error and response path detection. 2.0.6: Added LED brightness get/set support. 2.0.0: Migrated to /json API. Added real-time push notifications from device to hub, auto-registration of notify URL, and reboot command. Polling retained as fallback.
